title: Synthetic Long Table DSL
author: M5 Test Worker
theme: tech-minimal
---

# Synthetic Long Table

This fixture proves that a controlled long table can cross pages. The expected
PDF text must include the final row and the Chinese marker 长表格.

::: {.table type="long" long="true" density="compact" width="1.0" caption="Synthetic 长表格 page-break evidence" label="tab:synthetic-long-table" header="true" striped="true"}
